data.title: Lucid Kicks Off Gravity SUV Production To Take On Tesla's Model X
data.description: Lucid commences production of Gravity SUV at Arizona factory, expanding into larger market and competing with Tesla's Model X and upcoming mid-sized platform.

data.title: Tom Lee Says Bitcoin's $100K Milestone Could Be A 'Precursor' For Bullish Stock Moves, Asks Investors To Stay Focused On A 'Christmas Santa Claus Rally'
data.description: Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) surge beyond the $100,000 mark could be a harbinger of a bullish stock market, influential financial analyst Tom Lee said on Thursday.

data.title: Amazon Halts Inferentia AI Chip Development To Take On Nvidia: How Trainium Is Shaping Up To Be The New Weapon In AI Chip Wars
data.description: Amazon has halted the development of its Inferentia AI chip to focus on its Trainium chip, aiming to enhance cost performance and challenge Nvidia's dominance in the AI chip market, with plans to release a more powerful Trainium3 chip in 2025.

data.title: Intel Shakes Up Board With ASML And Microchip Technology Veterans Amid CEO Transition
data.description: Intel Corporation has appointed semiconductor industry veterans Eric Meurice and Steve Sanghi to its board of directors, the company announced Thursday, Dec. 5, 2024, as it navigates through significant leadership transitions and market challenges.

data.title: OpenAI Unveils $200 ChatGPT Pro Subscription: Inside The 'o1' Reasoning Model And What It Means For Power Users
data.description: OpenAI has launched a $200/month ChatGPT Pro subscription, providing unlimited access to its advanced "o1" reasoning model and offering enhanced performance, especially in coding and math tasks, as part of its "12 Days of OpenAI" event.
